name: TriggerType
description: Types of events that can trigger automated card sends

name.description: Display name of the trigger type (e.g., 'Birthday')

key.description: Unique identifier for the trigger type (e.g., 'birthday')

description.description: Description of when this trigger fires

icon.description: Icon name for UI display (e.g., 'cake' for birthday)

isActive.description: Whether this trigger type is available for use

defaultDaysBefore.description: Default number of days before trigger to send card

defaultDaysAfter.description: Default number of days after trigger to send card

defaultFrequencyCap.description: Default frequency cap for this trigger type

clientFieldRequired.description: Which client field is required for this trigger (e.g., 'birthday', 'renewal_date')
